Title: Learning to Generate and Evaluate Text

Abstract: Generative models have become a popular tool for text generation and evaluation. However, existing models are often trained on small datasets and lack the ability to generate diverse and coherent text. In this paper, we propose a new approach to text generation and evaluation that leverages the power of deep learning and reinforcement learning. Our model consists of a generative model and a reinforcement learning agent that learns to generate text that maximizes a reward signal based on human evaluations. We train the model using a combination of supervised and unsupervised training, and we evaluate its performance on a large-scale text generation task. Our results show that our model can generate high-quality text that is diverse and coherent, and that it outperforms existing models on a variety of evaluation metrics.
Source: http://arxiv.org/abs/2604.07213v1

[Paper 4] A Deep Learning Approach to Visual Question Answering
Title: A Deep Learning Approach to Visual Question Answering

Abstract: We present a deep learning approach to visual question answering (VQA) that combines a visual question embedding model with a deep neural network (DNN) to predict the answer to a given question. Our approach is based on a novel visual question embedding model that learns a visual representation of a question that captures the semantic and spatial information of the question. We then use the visual question embedding to predict the answer to the question by passing it through a DNN that learns to classify the answer options. We evaluate our approach on two benchmark datasets, Visual Question Answering (VQA) and Visual Question Answering with Object Detection (VQA-OD). Our results show that our approach outperforms the state-of-the-art methods on both datasets, achieving an average F1 score of 0.73 and 0.78, respectively. We also conduct a qualitative analysis of our results and identify several limitations and challenges for future work.
Source: https://arxiv.org/abs/2104.049
